---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
execute:
  echo: false
  eval: true
  freeze: auto
  cache: false
  warning: false
  message: false
resources:
  - figures/
  - _input_data/
---

<!-- Rede C2: layout v2 responsivo, inspirado no index Tsiino Hiiwiida. -->

```{=html}
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Montserrat:wght@400;500;600;700;800;900&family=Source+Serif+4:opsz,wght@8..60,400;8..60,600;8..60,700&family=Space+Mono:wght@400;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
```

```{=html}
<style>
:root {
  --rc2-red: #A93632;
  --rc2-red-dark: #6E1F1D;
  --rc2-green: #626A38;
  --rc2-green-dark: #2E3B24;
  --rc2-green-soft: #D7DDC5;
  --rc2-ochre: #D99A27;
  --rc2-cream: #F6F1E8;
  --rc2-paper: #FFFDF7;
  --rc2-ink: #171717;
  --rc2-muted: #675F55;
  --rc2-line: rgba(98,106,56,0.22);
  --rc2-shadow: 0 16px 34px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
}
*, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; }
html { scroll-behavior: smooth; overflow-x: hidden; }
body {
  width: 100%;
  max-width: 100%;
  overflow-x: hidden;
  background:
    linear-gradient(rgba(246,241,232,0.90), rgba(246,241,232,0.86)),
    url("figures/c2_bg.jpg");
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  background-size: cover;
  background-attachment: fixed;
  background-position: center top;
  color: var(--rc2-ink);
  font-family: 'Montserrat', Arial, sans-serif;
}
img, video, iframe, svg, canvas { max-width: 100%; }
a { color: var(--rc2-red); }
main.content, #quarto-content, main { background: transparent; width: 100%; max-width: none; }
main.content { padding-top: 0; padding-bottom: 3.5rem; }
.quarto-title-block, #title-block-header { display: none !important; }
.navbar { box-shadow: 0 2px 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.10); backdrop-filter: blur(10px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(10px); }
.navbar .navbar-brand, .navbar .nav-link { font-family: 'Montserrat', Arial, sans-serif; }
.navbar .nav-link.active-section { color: var(--rc2-red) !important; font-weight: 800; border-bottom: 2px solid var(--rc2-red); }
.rc2-page-hero {
  position: relative;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translateX(-50%);
  width: 100vw;
  min-height: clamp(340px, 44vh, 520px);
  display: grid;
  place-items: center;
  overflow: hidden;
  isolation: isolate;
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 88% 18%, rgba(217,154,39,0.42), transparent 30%),
    linear-gradient(110deg, rgba(46,59,36,0.96) 0%, rgba(98,106,56,0.88) 38%, rgba(169,54,50,0.88) 100%),
    url("figures/c2_bg.jpg");
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center;
  color: var(--rc2-cream);
}
.rc2-page-hero::after {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(0,0,0,0.20), rgba(0,0,0,0.34)),
    repeating-linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.08) 0 1px, transparent 1px 14px);
  z-index: -1;
}
.rc2-page-hero-inner {
  width: min(1260px, calc(100vw - 2rem));
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
  gap: clamp(1.2rem, 4vw, 3rem);
  align-items: end;
  padding: clamp(4rem, 8vw, 6.5rem) 0 clamp(2rem, 5vw, 4rem) 0;
}
.rc2-kicker, .rc2-eyebrow {
  display: inline-flex;
  width: fit-content;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.55rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.85rem;
  padding: 0.34rem 0.78rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: rgba(246,241,232,0.14);
  border: 1px solid rgba(246,241,232,0.22);
  color: var(--rc2-ochre);
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.68rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
  line-height: 1.2;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
}
.rc2-page-hero h1 {
  margin: 0;
  max-width: 960px;
  color: #fff;
  font-size: clamp(3rem, 8vw, 7rem);
  line-height: 0.88;
  font-weight: 900;
  letter-spacing: -0.08em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  text-shadow: 0 6px 28px rgba(0,0,0,0.35);
}
.rc2-title-line { display: block; }
.rc2-title-line:nth-child(2) { margin-left: clamp(0rem, 7vw, 4rem); }
.rc2-page-hero p {
  max-width: 820px;
  margin: 1rem 0 0 0;
  color: rgba(255,253,247,0.92);
  font-family: 'Source Serif 4', Georgia, serif;
  font-size: clamp(1.08rem, 2vw, 1.38rem);
  line-height: 1.5;
  text-shadow: 0 3px 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.30);
}
.rc2-hero-logo { width: clamp(92px, 10vw, 150px); filter: drop-shadow(0 12px 22px rgba(0,0,0,0.28)); }
.rc2-hero-logo img { display: block; width: 100%; height: auto; }
.rc2-section, .content-card {
  width: min(1260px, calc(100vw - 2rem));
  margin: 2.4rem auto 0 auto;
  padding: clamp(1.25rem, 3vw, 2.4rem);
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 100% 0%, rgba(217,154,39,0.08), transparent 32%),
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,253,247,0.96), rgba(246,241,232,0.88));
  border: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.18);
  border-top: 5px solid var(--rc2-green);
  box-shadow: var(--rc2-shadow);
  overflow: hidden;
}
.rc2-section--wide { width: min(1460px, calc(100vw - 2rem)); }
.rc2-section-title { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 90px 1fr; gap: 0.8rem; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 1.35rem; }
.rc2-section-title::before { content: ""; height: 1px; background: var(--rc2-ink); opacity: 0.72; }
.rc2-section-title h2 {
  margin: 0;
  padding-bottom: 0.45rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.18);
  color: var(--rc2-red);
  font-family: 'Montserrat', Arial, sans-serif;
  font-size: clamp(1.25rem, 3vw, 2.1rem);
  font-weight: 900;
  line-height: 1.05;
  letter-spacing: -0.045em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}
.rc2-display-title { margin: 0 0 1.1rem 0; color: var(--rc2-green-dark); font-size: clamp(2.15rem, 5vw, 5.4rem); line-height: 0.9; font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: -0.075em; }
.rc2-lead, .lead {
  margin: 0 0 1.25rem 0 !important;
  padding-left: 1rem;
  border-left: 5px solid var(--rc2-ochre);
  color: #191711 !important;
  font-family: 'Source Serif 4', Georgia, serif !important;
  font-size: clamp(1.08rem, 2vw, 1.3rem) !important;
  line-height: 1.65 !important;
}
.rc2-section p, .content-card p { color: var(--rc2-ink); font-size: 0.98rem; line-height: 1.72; }
.rc2-muted { color: var(--rc2-muted) !important; }
.rc2-pills, .tags { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.62rem; margin: 1rem 0; }
.rc2-pill, .tag, .pill {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.35rem;
  padding: 0.34rem 0.72rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: rgba(246,241,232,0.84);
  border: 1.5px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.28);
  color: var(--rc2-green-dark);
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.68rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  letter-spacing: 0.06em;
  line-height: 1.2;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}
.rc2-pill--red { color: var(--rc2-red); border-color: rgba(169,54,50,0.32); background: rgba(169,54,50,0.08); }
.rc2-pill--green { color: var(--rc2-green-dark); border-color: rgba(98,106,56,0.32); background: rgba(98,106,56,0.09); }
.rc2-pill--ochre { color: #7A5A18; border-color: rgba(217,154,39,0.42); background: rgba(217,154,39,0.10); }
.rc2-grid-2 { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr)); gap: 1rem; }
.rc2-grid-3 { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr)); gap: 1rem; }
.rc2-grid-4 { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(0, 1fr)); gap: 0.9rem; }
.rc2-card, .proto-card, .sites-box, .info-box {
  position: relative;
  min-width: 0;
  padding: clamp(1rem, 2vw, 1.35rem);
  border-radius: 20px;
  background: rgba(255,253,247,0.84);
  border: 1px solid var(--rc2-line);
  box-shadow: 0 10px 22px rgba(0,0,0,0.065);
  transition: transform 0.18s ease, box-shadow 0.18s ease, border-color 0.18s ease;
}
.rc2-card:hover, .proto-card:hover, .sites-box:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); border-color: rgba(169,54,50,0.30); box-shadow: 0 14px 26px rgba(0,0,0,0.10); }
.rc2-card h3, .proto-card h3, .sites-box h3 { margin: 0 0 0.7rem 0; color: var(--rc2-green-dark); font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: 0.11em; line-height: 1.25; text-transform: uppercase; }
.rc2-card p, .proto-card p, .sites-box p { margin: 0; color: var(--rc2-muted); font-size: 0.92rem; line-height: 1.6; }
.rc2-card ul { list-style: none; padding: 0; margin: 0; }
.rc2-card li { position: relative; padding-left: 1.25rem; margin: 0.52rem 0; line-height: 1.55; color: var(--rc2-ink); font-size: 0.94rem; }
.rc2-card li::before { content: ""; position: absolute; left: 0; top: 0.6rem; width: 7px; height: 7px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--rc2-ochre); }
.rc2-stat-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(0, 1fr)); gap: 0.75rem; margin-top: 1.2rem; }
.rc2-stat {
  min-height: 130px;
  padding: 1rem;
  border-radius: 20px;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: flex-end;
  color: var(--rc2-cream);
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 88% 18%, rgba(217,154,39,0.25), transparent 30%),
    linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(46,59,36,0.94), rgba(98,106,56,0.86)),
    url("figures/c2_bg.jpg");
  background-size: cover;
  box-shadow: 0 12px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
}
.rc2-stat strong { color: var(--rc2-ochre); font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3.1rem); line-height: 0.9; font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: -0.07em; }
.rc2-stat span { margin-top: 0.55rem; color: rgba(255,253,247,0.92); font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.64rem; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: 0.08em; line-height: 1.35; text-transform: uppercase; }
.rc2-btn-row { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.65rem; margin-top: 1.2rem; }
.rc2-btn { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 0.68rem 1.02rem; border-radius: 999px; font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; text-decoration: none !important; transition: transform 0.18s ease, box-shadow 0.18s ease, background 0.18s ease; }
.rc2-btn--main { background: var(--rc2-red); color: #fff !important; box-shadow: 0 8px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.18); }
.rc2-btn--ghost { background: rgba(246,241,232,0.92); color: var(--rc2-green-dark) !important; border: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.28); }
.rc2-btn:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 10px 22px rgba(0,0,0,0.18); }
.rc2-feature-band {
  position: relative;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translateX(-50%);
  width: 100vw;
  margin: 2.6rem 0 0 0;
  overflow: hidden;
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(246,241,232,0.94), rgba(246,241,232,0.78)),
    url("figures/c2_bg.jpg");
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center;
}
.rc2-feature-title-wrap { width: min(1260px, calc(100vw - 2rem)); margin: 0 auto; padding: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3.5rem) 0 1.15rem 0; }
.rc2-feature-title { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 0.45rem 0.85rem; background: var(--rc2-green-dark); color: var(--rc2-cream); border: 1px solid rgba(217,154,39,0.35); font-size: clamp(1.45rem, 3vw, 2.6rem); line-height: 1; font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: -0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; box-shadow: 0 10px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.12); }
.rc2-feature-title::before { content: ""; width: 18px; height: 44px; margin-right: 0.65rem; background: repeating-linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(246,241,232,0.96) 0 3px, transparent 3px 6px); border-left: 3px solid var(--rc2-ochre); }
.rc2-feature-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(6, minmax(0, 1fr)); min-height: clamp(360px, 35vw, 520px); }
.rc2-feature-photo, .rc2-feature-panel { min-height: clamp(360px, 35vw, 520px); min-width: 0; }
.rc2-feature-photo { position: relative; overflow: hidden; background: var(--rc2-green-dark); }
.rc2-feature-photo img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; display: block; filter: saturate(0.94) contrast(1.04); transition: transform 1.1s ease; }
.rc2-feature-photo:hover img { transform: scale(1.04); }
.rc2-feature-panel { display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: space-between; padding: clamp(1.15rem, 2.2vw, 1.9rem); color: #fff; background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--rc2-green), #4f5b33); }
.rc2-feature-panel:nth-child(4n) { background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--rc2-green-dark), #41502f); }
.rc2-feature-panel:nth-child(6n) { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #8b641a, var(--rc2-red-dark)); }
.rc2-feature-panel h3 { width: fit-content; margin: 0; padding: 0.48rem 0.72rem; background: var(--rc2-red-dark); color: var(--rc2-cream); border-left: 5px solid var(--rc2-ochre); font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.76rem; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; }
.rc2-feature-panel p { margin: 1.5rem 0 0 0 !important; color: var(--rc2-cream) !important; font-size: clamp(1.02rem, 1.55vw, 1.36rem) !important; line-height: 1.16 !important; font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: -0.035em; text-transform: uppercase; }
.reveal-ready { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(42px); transition: opacity 0.72s ease, transform 0.72s cubic-bezier(.2,.7,.2,1); transition-delay: var(--reveal-delay, 0ms); will-change: opacity, transform; }
.reveal-ready.is-visible { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
.rc2-feature-band.reveal-ready { transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(42px); }
.rc2-feature-band.reveal-ready.is-visible { transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(0); }
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .reveal-ready, .rc2-feature-band.reveal-ready { opacity: 1 !important; transform: none !important; transition: none !important; } .rc2-feature-band.reveal-ready, .rc2-feature-band.reveal-ready.is-visible { transform: translateX(-50%) !important; } }
@media (max-width: 1180px) { .rc2-grid-4 { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr)); } .rc2-feature-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr)); } .rc2-feature-photo, .rc2-feature-panel { min-height: 340px; } }
@media (max-width: 980px) { .rc2-page-hero-inner { grid-template-columns: 1fr; align-items: start; } .rc2-hero-logo { width: 92px; } .rc2-grid-2, .rc2-grid-3 { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } .rc2-stat-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr)); } }
@media (max-width: 760px) { .rc2-page-hero { width: 100vw; min-height: 360px; } .rc2-page-hero-inner, .rc2-section, .content-card { width: calc(100vw - 0.8rem); } .rc2-page-hero h1 { font-size: clamp(2.7rem, 15vw, 4.8rem); } .rc2-title-line:nth-child(2) { margin-left: 0; } .rc2-section-title { grid-template-columns: 44px 1fr; gap: 0.55rem; } .rc2-feature-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } .rc2-feature-photo, .rc2-feature-panel { min-height: 300px; } }
@media (max-width: 520px) { .rc2-stat-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } .rc2-btn { width: 100%; } .rc2-display-title { font-size: clamp(2.15rem, 13vw, 3.7rem); } }
</style>
```

```{=html}
<style>
.rc2-home-hero {
  position: relative;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translateX(-50%);
  width: 100vw;
  min-height: clamp(620px, 92vh, 880px);
  display: grid;
  align-items: center;
  overflow: hidden;
  isolation: isolate;
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 84% 18%, rgba(217,154,39,0.36), transparent 30%),
    linear-gradient(100deg, rgba(23,23,23,0.78) 0%, rgba(46,59,36,0.78) 44%, rgba(169,54,50,0.70) 100%),
    url("figures/c2_bg.jpg");
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center;
  color: #fff;
}
.rc2-home-hero::before {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  z-index: -1;
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(0,0,0,0.42) 0%, rgba(0,0,0,0.12) 36%, rgba(0,0,0,0.72) 100%),
    repeating-linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.08) 0 1px, transparent 1px 14px);
}
.rc2-home-hero-inner {
  width: min(1320px, calc(100vw - 2rem));
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: clamp(5.5rem, 9vw, 8rem) 0 clamp(3rem, 6vw, 5rem) 0;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1.08fr) minmax(300px, 0.55fr);
  gap: clamp(1.5rem, 5vw, 4.5rem);
  align-items: end;
}
.rc2-home-kicker {display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.6rem;padding:.38rem .82rem;border-radius:999px;background:rgba(246,241,232,.15);border:1px solid rgba(246,241,232,.25);color:var(--rc2-ochre);font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:clamp(.66rem,1vw,.82rem);font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;backdrop-filter:blur(8px)}
.rc2-home-title {margin:.85rem 0 0 0;color:#fff;font-size:clamp(4.6rem,12.5vw,11rem);line-height:.78;font-weight:900;letter-spacing:-.105em;text-transform:uppercase;text-shadow:0 8px 36px rgba(0,0,0,.46)}
.rc2-home-title .small{display:block;font-size:.42em;letter-spacing:-.035em;color:var(--rc2-ochre);margin-bottom:.08em}.rc2-home-title .big{display:block}.rc2-home-subtitle{margin:1.1rem 0 0 0;max-width:760px;color:rgba(255,253,247,.92);font-family:'Source Serif 4',Georgia,serif;font-size:clamp(1.12rem,2.1vw,1.48rem);line-height:1.55;text-shadow:0 3px 18px rgba(0,0,0,.42)}
.rc2-home-logo-card{align-self:stretch;display:grid;align-content:end;gap:1rem;padding:clamp(1rem,2vw,1.5rem);border-radius:28px;background:rgba(246,241,232,.12);border:1px solid rgba(246,241,232,.22);box-shadow:0 22px 48px rgba(0,0,0,.20);backdrop-filter:blur(9px)}.rc2-home-logo-card img{width:clamp(110px,14vw,190px);justify-self:start;filter:drop-shadow(0 12px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.32))}.rc2-home-logo-card p{margin:0;color:rgba(255,253,247,.88);font-size:.92rem;line-height:1.55}
.rc2-home-stats{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,minmax(0,1fr));gap:.75rem;margin-top:1.35rem}.rc2-home-stat{padding:.85rem;border-radius:18px;background:rgba(23,23,23,.30);border:1px solid rgba(246,241,232,.20);backdrop-filter:blur(8px)}.rc2-home-stat strong{display:block;color:var(--rc2-ochre);font-size:clamp(1.6rem,3.4vw,2.65rem);line-height:.95;font-weight:900;letter-spacing:-.06em}.rc2-home-stat span{display:block;margin-top:.4rem;color:rgba(255,253,247,.92);font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:.62rem;line-height:1.3;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;font-weight:800}.rc2-home-hero .rc2-btn--ghost{border-color:rgba(255,255,255,.55)}
@media(max-width:980px){.rc2-home-hero-inner{grid-template-columns:1fr}.rc2-home-logo-card{align-self:auto}.rc2-home-stats{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr))}}@media(max-width:560px){.rc2-home-hero{min-height:100vh}.rc2-home-hero-inner{width:calc(100vw - 1rem)}.rc2-home-title{font-size:clamp(4rem,23vw,6.8rem)}.rc2-home-stats{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
</style>
```


```{=html}
<style>
/* ==========================================================================
   REDEC2 RESPONSIVE WIDTH SYSTEM — v2
   Ajuste inspirado no index do Tsiino: nenhum card depende de 100vw para
   layout interno; os grids quebram por auto-fit; e as faixas ocupam a largura
   disponível sem empurrar conteúdo para a direita.
   ========================================================================== */
:root{
  --rc2-safe-gutter: clamp(0.75rem, 2.6vw, 2.25rem);
  --rc2-content-max: 1260px;
  --rc2-wide-max: 1480px;
  --rc2-xl-max: 1560px;
}

html,
body{
  width: 100% !important;
  max-width: 100% !important;
  overflow-x: hidden !important;
  overflow-x: clip !important;
}

body{
  margin-left: 0 !important;
  margin-right: 0 !important;
}

#quarto-content,
#quarto-document-content,
main,
main.content,
.page-columns,
.page-columns .content{
  min-width: 0 !important;
  max-width: 100% !important;
  overflow-x: hidden !important;
  overflow-x: clip !important;
}

main.content{
  width: 100% !important;
  padding-left: 0 !important;
  padding-right: 0 !important;
}

/* Faixas full-width sem o truque 100vw + translateX, que pode estourar no notebook. */
.rc2-page-hero,
.rc2-home-hero,
.rc2-feature-band{
  left: auto !important;
  right: auto !important;
  transform: none !important;
  width: 100% !important;
  max-width: 100% !important;
  margin-left: 0 !important;
  margin-right: 0 !important;
  overflow-x: hidden !important;
  overflow-x: clip !important;
}

/* Containers internos com margem segura. */
.rc2-page-hero-inner,
.rc2-feature-title-wrap,
.rc2-section,
.content-card,
.team-controls,
.team-group,
.team-empty,
.rc2-carousel-shell{
  width: min(var(--rc2-content-max), calc(100% - (var(--rc2-safe-gutter) * 2))) !important;
  max-width: calc(100% - (var(--rc2-safe-gutter) * 2)) !important;
  margin-left: auto !important;
  margin-right: auto !important;
  min-width: 0 !important;
}

.rc2-home-hero-inner{
  width: min(1320px, calc(100% - (var(--rc2-safe-gutter) * 2))) !important;
  max-width: calc(100% - (var(--rc2-safe-gutter) * 2)) !important;
  margin-left: auto !important;
  margin-right: auto !important;
  min-width: 0 !important;
}

.rc2-section--wide{
  width: min(var(--rc2-wide-max), calc(100% - (var(--rc2-safe-gutter) * 2))) !important;
}

.rc2-section--xl,
#institutions{
  width: min(var(--rc2-xl-max), calc(100% - (var(--rc2-safe-gutter) * 2))) !important;
}

/* Grids fluidos: nenhum repeat fixo força escape lateral. */
.rc2-grid-2,
.rc2-grid-3,
.rc2-grid-4,
.protocol-index,
.method-river{
  display: grid !important;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(min(100%, 260px), 1fr)) !important;
  gap: clamp(0.75rem, 1.6vw, 1rem) !important;
}

.rc2-grid-4,
.method-river{
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(min(100%, 220px), 1fr)) !important;
}

.rc2-stat-grid,
.rc2-home-stats{
  display: grid !important;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(min(100%, 150px), 1fr)) !important;
}

/* Cards e blocos sempre quebram texto internamente. */
.rc2-card,
.proto-card,
.method-step,
.team-card,
.inst-item,
.rc2-home-stat,
.rc2-home-logo-card,
.rc2-feature-panel,
.rc2-carousel-shell,
.leaflet-container{
  min-width: 0 !important;
  max-width: 100% !important;
  overflow-wrap: break-word !important;
}

/* Feature band: animação sem translateX, porque agora não há left:50%. */
.rc2-feature-band.reveal-ready{
  transform: translateY(42px) !important;
}
.rc2-feature-band.reveal-ready.is-visible{
  transform: translateY(0) !important;
}
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce){
  .rc2-feature-band.reveal-ready,
  .rc2-feature-band.reveal-ready.is-visible{
    transform: none !important;
  }
}

/* Carousel permanece animado, mas confinado dentro do shell. */
.rc2-carousel-shell{
  overflow: hidden !important;
}
.rc2-carousel-track{
  max-width: none !important;
}
.rc2-carousel-img{
  max-width: min(450px, 84vw) !important;
}

/* Instituições: seção mais larga e cards mais legíveis, sem estourar à direita. */
.inst-grid{
  display: grid !important;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(min(100%, 180px), 1fr)) !important;
  gap: clamp(0.65rem, 1.2vw, 0.95rem) !important;
  align-items: stretch !important;
}

.inst-item{
  min-height: 122px !important;
  justify-content: center !important;
  padding: clamp(0.85rem, 1.2vw, 1.05rem) !important;
  border-radius: 20px !important;
}

.inst-logo{
  width: 100% !important;
  height: clamp(56px, 5vw, 76px) !important;
  object-fit: contain !important;
}

.inst-name{
  max-width: 100% !important;
  line-height: 1.22 !important;
  overflow-wrap: anywhere !important;
}

/* Equipe: quebra progressiva limpa. */
.team-group{
  display: grid !important;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(min(100%, 320px), 1fr)) !important;
  gap: clamp(0.8rem, 1.5vw, 1rem) !important;
}

.team-controls{
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 0.68fr) minmax(0, 1fr) !important;
}

.team-index{
  min-width: 0 !important;
}

/* Mapa e htmlwidgets não devem criar largura fantasma. */
.html-widget,
.leaflet,
.leaflet-container,
iframe{
  width: 100% !important;
  max-width: 100% !important;
}

/* Tablet */
@media (max-width: 980px){
  .rc2-page-hero-inner,
  .rc2-home-hero-inner{
    grid-template-columns: 1fr !important;
  }

  .team-controls{
    grid-template-columns: 1fr !important;
  }

  .rc2-section-title{
    grid-template-columns: 56px 1fr !important;
  }
}

/* Mobile */
@media (max-width: 640px){
  :root{
    --rc2-safe-gutter: 0.65rem;
  }

  .rc2-section,
  .content-card{
    padding: clamp(1rem, 4vw, 1.35rem) !important;
    border-radius: 22px !important;
  }

  .rc2-page-hero,
  .rc2-home-hero{
    min-height: auto !important;
  }

  .rc2-page-hero-inner,
  .rc2-home-hero-inner{
    padding-left: 0 !important;
    padding-right: 0 !important;
  }

  .rc2-page-hero h1,
  .rc2-home-title{
    overflow-wrap: anywhere !important;
  }

  .rc2-section-title{
    grid-template-columns: 34px 1fr !important;
  }

  .rc2-btn{
    width: 100% !important;
    justify-content: center !important;
  }

  .inst-grid{
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr)) !important;
  }
}

/* Celulares muito estreitos */
@media (max-width: 380px){
  .inst-grid,
  .rc2-stat-grid,
  .rc2-home-stats{
    grid-template-columns: 1fr !important;
  }
}
</style>
```

```{=html}
<section class="rc2-home-hero" id="inicio" aria-label="RedeC2 homepage hero">
  <div class="rc2-home-hero-inner">
    <div>
      <div class="rc2-home-kicker">Research Network · Brazil</div>
      <h1 class="rc2-home-title"><span class="small">Rede</span><span class="big">C2</span></h1>
      <p class="rc2-home-subtitle">Permanent plots for understanding Caatinga and Cerrado dynamics across Brazil's seasonally dry ecosystems.</p>
      <div class="rc2-pills" aria-label="Main themes"><span class="rc2-pill rc2-pill--red">Caatinga</span><span class="rc2-pill rc2-pill--green">Cerrado</span><span class="rc2-pill rc2-pill--ochre">Long-term plots</span><span class="rc2-pill">Dry ecosystems</span></div>
      <div class="rc2-btn-row"><a class="rc2-btn rc2-btn--main" href="sites/">Explore sites</a><a class="rc2-btn rc2-btn--ghost" href="protocols/">See protocols</a></div>
      <div class="rc2-home-stats" aria-label="Network highlights"><div class="rc2-home-stat"><strong>2</strong><span>target biomes</span></div><div class="rc2-home-stat"><strong>∞</strong><span>long-term monitoring</span></div><div class="rc2-home-stat"><strong>+10</strong><span>partner institutions</span></div><div class="rc2-home-stat"><strong>BR</strong><span>national network</span></div></div>
    </div>
    <aside class="rc2-home-logo-card" aria-label="RedeC2 visual identity"><img src="figures/logoc2.png" alt="RedeC2 logo"><p>A collaborative platform for comparable field data, ecological synthesis and evidence-based conservation in Caatinga and Cerrado systems.</p></aside>
  </div>
</section>
```

```{=html}
<section class="rc2-section" id="rede">
  <div class="rc2-section-title"><h2>The RedeC2 network</h2></div>
  <div class="rc2-grid-2">
    <div><p class="rc2-lead"><strong>RedeC2</strong> is a collaborative research network dedicated to understanding the multifunctional dynamics of Brazil's seasonally dry tropical ecosystems, especially Caatinga and Cerrado.</p><p>Bringing together researchers from multiple institutions, the network integrates permanent plots, floristic inventories, functional traits and environmental data to investigate how plant communities are structured and how they respond to climatic seasonality, soil conditions and landscape context.</p><p>Across different sites and regions, RedeC2 studies how natural gradients and human-driven disturbances influence vegetation structure, successional pathways and the spatial turnover of species.</p></div>
    <div class="rc2-card"><h3>Overarching goal</h3><p>Generate robust, comparable data that support conservation planning, ecological restoration and evidence-based management of dry ecosystems in Brazil.</p><div class="rc2-pills"><span class="rc2-pill rc2-pill--green">Floristics</span><span class="rc2-pill rc2-pill--red">Dynamics</span><span class="rc2-pill rc2-pill--ochre">Restoration</span><span class="rc2-pill">Open workflows</span></div></div>
  </div>
</section>
```

```{=html}
<section class="rc2-feature-band" id="eixos" aria-label="RedeC2 working axes">
  <div class="rc2-feature-title-wrap"><div class="rc2-feature-title">Sites, data, and outputs</div></div>
  <div class="rc2-feature-grid"><article class="rc2-feature-photo"><img src="figures/canudos_dc.jpg" alt="Caatinga landscape" loading="lazy" decoding="async"></article><article class="rc2-feature-panel"><h3>Sites</h3><p>Permanent plots across Caatinga and Cerrado formations.</p></article><article class="rc2-feature-photo"><img src="figures/agua_limpa.jpg" alt="Cerrado landscape" loading="lazy" decoding="async"></article><article class="rc2-feature-panel"><h3>Gradients</h3><p>Seasonality, soils, structure and landscape context.</p></article><article class="rc2-feature-photo"><img src="figures/gruta_brejoes_dc.jpg" alt="Dry ecosystem field site" loading="lazy" decoding="async"></article><article class="rc2-feature-panel"><h3>Products</h3><p>Comparable data for conservation, restoration and synthesis.</p></article></div>
</section>
```

```{=html}
<section class="rc2-section" id="workflows"><div class="rc2-section-title"><h2>Integrated monitoring workflow</h2></div><div class="rc2-grid-4"><article class="rc2-card"><h3>01 · Permanent plots</h3><p>Repeated measurements of woody vegetation, herbs, regeneration and coarse woody debris in standardized units.</p></article><article class="rc2-card"><h3>02 · Species and traits</h3><p>Floristic inventories, taxonomic standardization and functional trait records connected to ecological gradients.</p></article><article class="rc2-card"><h3>03 · Environmental context</h3><p>Climate, soil and landscape layers combined with field records for cross-site comparability.</p></article><article class="rc2-card"><h3>04 · Synthesis</h3><p>Outputs for ecological theory, biodiversity conservation, restoration planning and public decision-making.</p></article></div></section>
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
library(htmltools)
if (requireNamespace("yaml", quietly = TRUE)) {
  logo_dir <- "figures/logo_inst"
  manifest_path <- file.path(logo_dir, "institutions.yml")
  if (file.exists(manifest_path)) {
    inst <- yaml::read_yaml(manifest_path)
    inst <- Filter(function(x) { is.list(x) && !is.null(x$file) && file.exists(file.path(logo_dir, x$file)) }, inst)
    inst <- inst[order(tolower(vapply(inst, `[[`, "", "name")))]
    make_tile <- function(x) {
      tile_inner <- tagList(tags$img(src = paste0("figures/logo_inst/", x$file), class = "inst-logo", alt = x$name, loading = "lazy", decoding = "async"), tags$div(class = "inst-name", x$name))
      if (!is.null(x$url) && nzchar(x$url)) tags$a(class="inst-item", href=x$url, target="_blank", rel="noopener", tile_inner) else tags$div(class="inst-item", tile_inner)
    }
    tagList(
      tags$style(HTML(".inst-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(min(100%,180px),1fr));gap:clamp(.65rem,1.2vw,.95rem);margin-top:1rem;align-items:stretch}.inst-item{min-width:0;max-width:100%;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:.58rem;padding:clamp(.85rem,1.2vw,1.05rem);min-height:122px;border-radius:20px;background:rgba(255,253,247,.88);border:1px solid rgba(98,106,56,.18);text-decoration:none;transition:transform .18s ease,box-shadow .18s ease}.inst-item:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 12px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.10)}.inst-logo{width:100%;height:clamp(56px,5vw,76px);object-fit:contain}.inst-name{font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:.62rem;line-height:1.22;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.05em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#2E3B24;text-align:center;overflow-wrap:anywhere}@media(max-width:640px){.inst-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr))}}@media(max-width:380px){.inst-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}}")),
      tags$section(class="rc2-section rc2-section--xl", id="institutions", tags$div(class="rc2-section-title", tags$h2("Participating institutions")), tags$div(class="inst-grid", lapply(inst, make_tile)))
    )
  }
}
```

```{=html}
<section class="rc2-section" id="contact"><div class="rc2-section-title"><h2>Contact</h2></div><div class="rc2-grid-2"><div class="rc2-card"><h3>Email</h3><p><a href="mailto:c2redec2@gmail.com">c2redec2@gmail.com</a></p></div><div class="rc2-card"><h3>Repository</h3><p><a href="https://github.com/C2rede" target="_blank" rel="noopener">github.com/C2rede</a></p></div></div></section>
```

```{=html}
<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
  const revealTargets = document.querySelectorAll(
    ".rc2-section, .content-card, .rc2-page-hero, .rc2-home-hero, .rc2-feature-band, .team-controls, .team-card"
  );
  revealTargets.forEach((el, index) => {
    el.classList.add("reveal-ready");
    el.style.setProperty("--reveal-delay", `${Math.min(index, 8) * 45}ms`);
  });
  if (window.matchMedia("(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)").matches || !("IntersectionObserver" in window)) {
    revealTargets.forEach(el => el.classList.add("is-visible"));
  } else {
    const revealObserver = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
      entries.forEach(entry => {
        if (entry.isIntersecting) {
          entry.target.classList.add("is-visible");
          revealObserver.unobserve(entry.target);
        }
      });
    }, { threshold: 0.12, rootMargin: "0px 0px -8% 0px" });
    revealTargets.forEach(el => revealObserver.observe(el));
  }
  const sections = document.querySelectorAll("section[id]");
  const navLinks = document.querySelectorAll(".navbar a[href]");
  if (sections.length && "IntersectionObserver" in window) {
    const navObserver = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
      entries.forEach(entry => {
        if (!entry.isIntersecting) return;
        const id = entry.target.id;
        navLinks.forEach(link => {
          const href = link.getAttribute("href") || "";
          link.classList.toggle("active-section", href.endsWith("#" + id));
        });
      });
    }, { rootMargin: "-35% 0px -55% 0px", threshold: 0 });
    sections.forEach(section => navObserver.observe(section));
  }
});
</script>
```
